reasoning: The control SC-7 (4) focuses on boundary protection and ensuring that external telecommunications services are not publicly accessible without proper security measures. In Kubernetes, similar protections can be implemented using NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that pods are not exposed to the internet by default. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress resources helps prevent unauthorized public access.
title: Boundary Protection | External Telecommunications Services
